category_sources: source_facts.description says it uses Realtek DVB-T dongles as SDR devices.
source_facts.homepage is the Osmocom RTL-SDR wiki.
docs_sources: Official repository README is an available source documentation fallback.
source_facts.homepage is the official Osmocom RTL-SDR wiki documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/steve-m/librtlsdr, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SDR use with Realtek DVB-T dongles.
source_facts.executables lists rtl_sdr, rtl_fm, rtl_tcp, rtl_power, and related SDR tools.
